title: Ruby bliel
content:
{{Top|canon=Ruby Bliel}} {{Otheruses|Ruby}} {{Food |image=[[File:Ruby_Bliel.png]] |name=Ruby bliel |origin= |date= |race= |creator= |found=*[[Baruk's Bar]], [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]'' *[[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' **[[Blue Brubb]] **[[Maggy the Gorgon's]] |type= |description=A transparent [[Color/Legends|blue]] liquid{{GalaxiesAED}} |animals= |plants=*[[Fruit/Legends|Fruits]] {{C|Possibly liquidized}}{{FactFile|131|FOO 7-8|Galactic Food and Drink}} *Possibly liquidized [[Vegetable/Legends|vegetables]] |other=[[Water/Legends|Water]] |edible=*[[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] *[[Human/Legends|Humans]] *[[Rodian/Legends|Rodians]] |inedible= |potable= |nutrition= |effects= |dishes= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|I could go for one of those.''"
"''Yeah, me too.|Kyle Katarn and Lando Calrissian|''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]''}} '''Ruby bliel''' was a gooey, tasty drink that could be found on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. It was known to have been available at several [[Cantina/Legends|cantinas]] on Tatooine, including [[Maggy the Gorgon's]] and the [[Blue Brubb]] in [[Mos Espa/Legends|Mos Espa]] and stalls around Mos Espa. It was a favorite of young [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], [[W. Wald]] and [[Kitster Chanchani Banai]]. It was one of multiple drinks, alongside the [[galaxy guzzler]] and [[dusty dazzler]], that could be made using a mixture of liquidized [[Fruit/Legends|fruits]] and [[Vegetable/Legends|vegetables]], as well as [[Water/Legends|water]]. Its liquid form was meant to maximize liquid intake, as Tatooine's [[Binary star/Legends|twin]] [[Star/Legends|suns]]—[[Tatoo I/Legends|Tatoo I]] and [[Tatoo II/Legends|Tatoo II]]—gave the planet extreme [[Temperature/Legends|temperatures]]. The ruby bliel was [[Alcohol/Legends|non-alcoholic]]. It was also a popular drink in [[Baruk's Bar]] on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]], generally recommended by the grammatically challenged [[Baldarek|Red-Eye Baldarek]]. [[Reelo Baruk]] himself may have been fond of the drink, as he used its name for the password to his secret command center within his garbage facility. Unfortunately for Baruk, [[Kyle Katarn]] was able to learn this code from an imprisoned [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], which soon led to Baruk's undoing. ==Appearances== *''[[Anakin's Fate]]'' *[[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (novelization)|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'' novelization]] {{Ab|Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm}} *[[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (video game)|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'' video game]] {{Mo}} *''[[Episode I: Anakin Skywalker]]'' *"[[Podracing Tales]]" *[[Episode I: The Phantom Menace ½|''Episode I: The Phantom Menace'' ½]] *{{GalaxiesAED}} *''[[Tatooine Ghost]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]'' {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided Quick Reference Guide]]'' *{{FactFile|131|FOO 7-8|Galactic Food and Drink}} *[[Star Wars Galaxies: The Total Experience: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars Galaxies: The Total Experience'': Prima Official Game Guide]] *{{SonyCite|url=content.jsp?page=Friday%20Feature:%20The%20Secrets%20of%20Good%20Eating|text=Friday Feature: The Secrets of Good Eating}} *[[Star Wars Galaxies: The Complete Guide: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars Galaxies: The Complete Guide'': Prima Official Game Guide]] *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{DB|character|wald|Wald}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{SWGWiki|Ruby Bliel}} {{Interlang |de=Rubinbliel |pl=Rubinowy bliel }} [[Category:Beverages]] [[Category:Tatooinian food]]
